Dakar Continental Information

Dakar Continental FIR is a Flight Information Region that spans multiple countries, namely Senegal (in full), Mauritania (in full), Ivory Coast (in full), Guinea-Bissau (partially), Mali (partially) and a slice of airspace from Burkina Faso.

Dakar Oceanic is part of the Dakar FIR, but operational purposes, we've split it from Dakar Continental.

Airport Coverage

Dakar Continental covers the following airports:

Senegal

ICAO Name City Status Remarks
GOBD Blaise Diagne Intl Dakar-Diass - -
GOGG Ziguinchor Ziguinchor Not Available -
GOGK Sare Bidji Kolda Not Available -
GOGS Cap Skirring Intl Cap Skirring Not Available -
GOOK Kaolack Kaolack Not Available -
GOOY Leopold Sedar Senghor Dakar Not Available -
GOSM Ouro Sogui Matam Not Available -
GOSP Podor Podor Not Available -
GOSR Richard Toll Richard Toll Not Available -
GOSS St Louis St Louis Not Available -
GOTB Bakel Bakel Not Available -
GOTS Simenti Simenti Not Available -
GOTT Tambacounda Tambacounda Not Available -

This page is a subsection of the Senegal country page.

Dakar Continental Sectors

* The Dakar Continental airspace is divided into the following sectors:

Abidjan

Position Callsign Frequency CPDLC Remarks
DIII_CTR Abidjan Control 129.100 DIII -
Airspace Class Owner Limits Remarks
Abidjan FIS G DIII_CTR GND - FL145 -
Abidjan FIS G DIII_CTR FL145 - FL195 Except for ATS Routes (Class A)
Abidjan FIS G DIII_CTR FL195 - FL245 -
Abidjan UTA A DIII_CTR FL245 - UNLTD -

Bamako

Position Callsign Frequency CPDLC Remarks
GAAA_CTR Bamako Control 125.400 GAAA -
Airspace Class Owner Limits Remarks
Bamako FIS G GAAA_CTR GND - FL145 -
Bamako FIS G GAAA_CTR FL145 - FL195 Except for ATS Routes (Class A)
Bamako FIS G GAAA_CTR FL195 - FL245 -
Bamako UTA A GAAA_CTR FL245 - UNLTD -

Dakar

Position Callsign Frequency CPDLC Remarks
GOOO_CTR Dakar Control 129.500 GOOO -

^ Airspace ^ Class ^ Owner ^ Limits ^ Remarks ^

Dakar Continental G GOOO_CTR GND - FL145 -
Dakar Continental G GOOO_CTR FL145 - FL195 With the exception of ATS Routes
Dakar Continental A GOOO_CTR FL195 - FL245 -
Dakar Continental UIR A GOOO_CTR FL245 - UNLTD -

Nouakchott

Position Callsign Frequency CPDLC Remarks
GQQQ_CTR Nouakchott Control 124.200 GQQQ -
Airspace Class Owner Limits Remarks
Nouakchott FIS G GQQQ_CTR GND - FL145 -
Nouakchott FIS G GQQQ_CTR FL145 - FL195 Except for ATS Routes (Class A)
Nouakchott FIS A GQQQ_CTR FL195 - FL245 -
Nouakchott UTA A GQQQ_CTR FL245 - UNLTD RNP10 between FL245 and FL460

GOOO Dakar Continental | v0.1

>> Go to this page.
>> Go to this page.

GOOO Dakar Airspace Rules

Separation

  • Satellite based ADS-B coverage is available in the Abidjan, Bamako, Dakar and Nouakchott sectors and as such, the following separation standards are to be applied:

Vertical Separation

  • Separation of 1000 ft in RVSM airspace and below then 2000 ft above RVSM airspace

Horizontal Separation

  • Separation of 10 NM between position symbols.
  • Separation of 5 NM between position symbol between an aircraft in Climb or Descent configuration and another stable aircraft at a flight level provided that the climbing or descending aircraft crosses the level of stable traffic only behind said traffic.

SELCAL

  • Dakar Continental offers SELCAL capabilities.

SLOP

  • The use of SLOP in Dakar Continental is in compliance with provisions in ICAO Doc. 4444, between flight level FL280 and FL460.
  • Pilots are advised to coordinate offset on UNICOM (122.800).

GOOO Dakar Continental | v0.1

>> Go to this page.
>> Go to this page.

Dakar Transition Table

  • Some airfields within SSA have published fixed Transition Levels. In this case, use the published transition level.
  • CAUTION – With a fixed Transition Level, it may mean less than 1,000 ft separation exists between aircraft operating at the Transition Altitude and Transition Level depending on the QNH.
  • Where a fixed transition level is not published, use the table below to determine the transition level.
QNH 2000 3000 4000 5000 6000 7000 8000 9000 10000 14000
1060 - 1050 FL020 FL030 FL040 FL050 FL060 FL070 FL080 FL090 FL100 FL140
1049 - 1032 FL025 FL035 FL045 FL055 FL065 FL075 FL085 FL095 FL105 FL145
1031 - 1014 FL030 FL040 FL050 FL060 FL070 FL080 FL090 FL100 FL110 FL150
1013 - 995 FL035 FL045 FL055 FL065 FL075 FL085 FL095 FL105 FL115 FL155
  • Although the Transition Level may not be a ‘whole’ flight level. Commonly the ‘Lowest Useful Flight Level’ will be the nearest ‘whole’ flight level. E.g. FL85 would be FL90 (Always round up)
Airport Transition Altitude Transition Level (If Fixed)
DIAP 3100 ft -
DIBK 4200 ft -
DIKO 4500 ft -
DIMN 7000 ft -
DIOD 4500 ft -
DISP 3100 ft -
DIYO 4200 ft -
GABS 3330 ft -
GAKD 2800 ft -
GAMB 3500 ft -
GBYD 2500 ft -
GOBD 3500 ft -
GOGG 2800 ft -
GGOV 3000 ft -
GOGS 3100 ft -
GOOY 2600 ft -
GOSS 2500 ft -
GQNO 3100 ft -
GQPP 2500 ft -

GCCC Canaries

  • Aircraft southbound from Canarias FIR have to establish contact will Nouakchott ACC 10 mn before reaching the UTA.
